title: Perperok
description: Perperok is a locally running PDF unlocker application written in Python. It allows users to easily remove password protection from PDF files, enabling them to access and edit their documents without restrictions.

title: nonlinear equation system solutions with optimization
description: It is my bachelor's thesis focused on solving nonlinear equation systems using numerical methods, optimization techniques and analyzing their convergence and performance.

title: elea coaching
description: elea coaching is a web application created for coaches to track weekly studies of students and provide feedback.

title: movie teller
description: A light weight and ad free movie recommendation app designed with 2000s web UI aesthetics.

title: CDR Viewer
description: A web application developed to search, filter, and visualize large (or small) scale Call Detail Record (CDR) files in ASCII format.

title: serhet.com
description: I maintain this website to develop my frontend skills and practise version control.
